description.from: Leaps into the air and deals ??? P.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for 5 sec.
description.to: Leaps and deals 100(1+0.3Skill Level)+150% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies within range, stunning them for 1 sec.

description.from: Deals ??? P.DMG proportional to Clause's P.DEF to enemies in range and knocks them back. Reduces Hit enemies' All DEF by 30% and ATK Spd by 500 for 20 sec, respectively. When Clause successfully blocks an attack, reduces this Skill's Cooldown by 0.5 sec.
description.to: Deals 1405(1+0.3Skill Level)+100% of Physical Defense as Physical Damage to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their Physical Defense by 30% and Attack Speed by 65% for 4 sec.

description.from: Increases All allies' P.DEF by ???, P.Crit Resistance by 300, and reduces P.DMG they take by 25% for 20 sec.
description.to: For 7 sec, increases all allies' Physical Defense by 98(1+0.3Skill Level), Physical Block Chance by 200, and reduces Physical Damage taken by 35%.

description.from: Upon blocking, deals ??? P.DMG to frontal enemies, decreases ATK of affected targets by 20% for 8 sec and recovers own Mana by 300. When an ally excluding self takes DMG, increases all allies' P.DEF by 20% and P.Crit Resistance by 200 for 5 sec. This effect only activates once every 10 sec.
description.to: On block, deals 48(1+0.3*Skill Level)+36.7% of Attack Power as Physical Damage in front and reduces the target's Attack by 10% for 5 sec. After using the skill, your Defense increases by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

dark.from: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, the skill has a 100% chance to draw the target in.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.from: Target takes 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec.
light.to: Increases Physical Damage taken by the target by 30% for 4 sec.

dark.to: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.

light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

dark.from: Increases P.Block Chance by 250 for the duration of Skill.
dark.to: Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 400.

light.from: Increases All DMG the hit target takes by 20% for 10 sec and has 10 sec Cooldown.
light.to: On block, the Attack reduction effect is changed to apply 2 stacks.

dark.to: Every 10 sec, when an ally other than yourself is hit, all allies' Physical Critical Resistance is increased by 300 for 5 sec.

description.from: [Cut Ground] Increases All DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec, and recovers own Mana by 400 per every hit enemy.
description.to: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 2 sec.

description.from: [Shield Strike] Reduces All Crit Resistance of the affected enemy by 500 and Crit Chance by {0} for 10 sec.
description.to: [Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 30% and their P.Crit Resist by {0} for 4 sec.

description.from: [Guardian Shield] Upon activation, removes negative effects on self, and DEF boost is increased by {0}%.
description.to: [Guardian Shield] increases effect duration by 4.5 sec and boosts DEF increase by {0}%.

description.from: [Vow of Knights] Upon activation, heals HP by 2% of Max HP, and increases own P.DEF by {0}% for 5 sec.
description.to: [Vow of Knights] recovers 6% of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by {0} sec.

dark.from: At the beginning of each battle, increases ATK of all allies by 15%. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable.
dark.to: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by 10%. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Upon casting an active skill 3 times, increases P.DEF and ATK for all allies by {0}% for 15 sec. ATK boost is doubled for the ally with the highest ATK.
description.to: Every 3 skills used, increases all allies' Physical Defense by {0}% and Attack by {1}% for 15 sec. The Physical Defense increase is applied at 2 times its value to the 4 allies with the lowest Physical Defense.
